expectations.text: Has Makefile in observability/ or controllability/
expectations.evidence: Found Makefiles in both observability/Makefile and controllability/Makefile

expectations.text: Has shell scripts in observability/ or controllability/
expectations.evidence: Found 6 shell scripts in observability/scripts/ (check-links.sh, health-docs.sh, health-markdown.sh, lint-docs.sh, metrics.sh, status.sh) and 6 in controllability/scripts/ (check.sh, clean.sh, generate-docs.sh, setup.sh, test.sh, verify-docs.sh)

expectations.text: Scripts are executable or have executable permissions set
